actions.script: (() => { const avatar = document.querySelector('.avatar, [class*="avatar"], img[class*="avatar"], .user-avatar, .el-avatar, [class*="user-head"]'); if (avatar) return 'logged_in:avatar_visible'; const loginBtns = [...document.querySelectorAll('button, a, span, div')].filter(el => el.textContent.trim().includes('登录') && el.offsetParent !== null); if (loginBtns.length > 0 && loginBtns[0].offsetParent !== null) return 'not_logged_in:login_button_visible:' + loginBtns[0].textContent.trim(); const token = document.cookie.split(';').find(c => c.trim().startsWith('cainiaosheji_token=')); if (token) return 'logged_in:token_found'; return 'unknown:no_avatar_no_login_btn_no_token'; })()

(function(){var t=document.body.innerText;var m=t.match(/[余剩]?[额积分][：:\s]*(\d+)/)||t.match(/当前积分[：:\s]*(\d+)/);if(m){var n=parseInt(m[1],10);if(n<=100)return 'CREDIT_TOO_LOW:'+n;return 'credits_ok:'+n}var apiKey=localStorage.getItem('userInfo');try{if(apiKey){var info=JSON.parse(apiKey);if(info&&info.credits){var c=parseInt(info.credits,10);if(c<=100)return'CREDIT_TOO_LOW:'+c;return'credits_ok:'+c}}}catch(e){}return 'credits_not_found_on_page'})()

(() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; const target = els.find(el => el.children.length === 0 && el.textContent.trim() === '文生图'); if (target) { target.click(); return 'clicked 文生图'; } const link = [...document.querySelectorAll('a,span,div,li')].find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '文生图' && el.offsetParent !== null); if (link) { link.click(); return 'clicked 文生图 via link'; } return '文生图 not found'; })()

(() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('a,span,div,li,p,h1,h2,h3,h4')]; const target = els.find(el => el.textContent.trim() === '电商' && el.offsetParent !== null); if (target) { target.click(); return 'clicked 电商'; } return '电商 not found'; })()

(() => { const pageText = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')).map(el => el.textContent.trim()).filter(t => t.length > 0 && t.length < 100).join(' | '); const fileInput = document.querySelector('input[type="file"]'); if (fileInput) { const file = new File([''], 'demo_product.jpg', { type: 'image/jpeg' }); const dataTransfer = new DataTransfer(); dataTransfer.items.add(file); fileInput.files = dataTransfer.files; fileInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); fileInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); return 'uploaded_demo_image | page: ' + pageText.substring(0, 300); } const uploadAreas = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')).filter(el => el.textContent.trim().includes('上传') || el.textContent.trim().includes('商品图')); if (uploadAreas.length > 0) return 'upload_area_found_but_no_file_input | page: ' + pageText.substring(0, 300); return 'no_upload_area | page: ' + pageText.substring(0, 300); })()

(() => { const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('label, .el-form-item__label, .form-label, .label, span, div')).map(el => el.textContent.trim()).filter(t => t.length > 0 && t.length < 50); const productNameLabel = labels.find(l => l.includes('产品名称') || l.includes('商品名称') || l.includes('产品名')); if (productNameLabel) { const labelElements = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')).filter(el => el.textContent.trim() === productNameLabel && el.offsetParent !== null); if (labelElements.length > 0) { const labelEl = labelElements[0]; let input = labelEl.parentElement?.querySelector('input[type="text"], input:not([type]), textarea'); if (!input) input = labelEl.nextElementSibling?.querySelector('input, textarea'); if (!input) { const container = labelEl.closest('.el-form-item, .form-item, .input-container'); if (container) input = container.querySelector('input, textarea'); } if (input) { const nativeSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value')?.set; if (nativeSetter) nativeSetter.call(input, '速溶黑咖啡'); else input.value = '速溶黑咖啡'; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return 'set product name to 速溶黑咖啡'; } } } return 'product name field not found, labels: ' + JSON.stringify(labels.slice(0, 20)); })()
actions.narration: 输入产品名称：速溶黑咖啡

actions.script: (function(){var labels=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('label,.el-form-item__label,.form-label,.label,span,div')).map(function(e){return e.textContent.trim()}).filter(function(t){return t.length>0&&t.length<50});var catLabel=labels.find(function(l){return l.includes('品类')||l.includes('分类')});if(catLabel){var labelEls=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')).filter(function(el){return el.textContent.trim()===catLabel&&el.offsetParent!==null});if(labelEls.length>0){var el=labelEls[0];var select=el.parentElement?el.parentElement.querySelector('select,.el-select,[role="combobox"],[class*="select"]'):null;if(!select)select=el.nextElementSibling?el.nextElementSibling.querySelector('select,.el-select'):null;if(!select){var container=el.closest('.el-form-item,.form-item');if(container)select=container.querySelector('select,.el-select')}if(select){if(select.tagName==='SELECT'){select.value='咖啡冲饮';select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return'selected 咖啡冲饮'}select.click();setTimeout(function(){var items=document.querySelectorAll('.el-select-dropdown__item,[class*="option"]');var target=Array.from(items).find(function(item){return item.textContent.includes('咖啡')||item.textContent.includes('冲饮')});if(target)target.click()},800);return'opened_category_dropdown'}else return'skip_select_no_dropdown_or_use_textarea'}var nextInput=el.nextElementSibling;if(nextInput&&(nextInput.tagName==='TEXTAREA'||nextInput.tagName==='INPUT')){return'category_select_not_needed'}}return'category_field_not_found'})()

(() => { const labels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('label, .el-form-item__label, .form-label, .label, span, div')).map(el => el.textContent.trim()).filter(t => t.length > 0 && t.length < 50); const descLabel = labels.find(l => l.includes('商品描述') || l.includes('产品描述') || l.includes('描述') || l.includes('补充描述')); if (descLabel) { const labelElements = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*')).filter(el => el.textContent.trim() === descLabel && el.offsetParent !== null); if (labelElements.length > 0) { const labelEl = labelElements[0]; let textarea = labelEl.parentElement?.querySelector('textarea'); if (!textarea) textarea = labelEl.nextElementSibling?.querySelector('textarea'); if (!textarea) { const container = labelEl.closest('.el-form-item, .form-item'); if (container) textarea = container.querySelector('textarea'); } if (textarea) { textarea.value = '咖啡包装设计，简约时尚风格，适合线上销售，需要突出咖啡豆和新鲜感。'; textarea.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); textarea.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return 'set product description'; } } } return 'product description field not found'; })()

(() => { const els = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')]; const target = els.find(el => el.textContent.includes('开始生成') && el.offsetParent !== null && (el.tagName === 'BUTTON' || el.tagName === 'SPAN' || el.tagName === 'A' || el.tagName === 'DIV')); if (target) { const btn = target.closest('button') || target; btn.click(); return 'clicked 开始生成'; } return '开始生成 not found'; })()

actions.selector: img[src*='txt2img'], img[src*='result'], img[src*='generate'], .result-image img, .gallery-image img, .product-image img, .ecommerce-result img, img[src*='image'], img[src*='img'], .el-image img, img[class*='result'], img[class*='image']
actions.name: ecommerce_result_01

actions.selector: img[src*='txt2img']:nth-child(2), img[src*='result']:nth-child(2), .result-image:nth-child(2) img, .gallery-image:nth-child(2) img, .product-image:nth-child(2) img, .ecommerce-result:nth-child(2) img, img[src*='image']:nth-child(2), img[src*='img']:nth-child(2)
actions.name: ecommerce_result_02
